name: FocusFlow
description: FocusFlow is a productivity app that helps users stay focused and avoid distractions. It provides a timer, statistics, and customizable settings to help users manage their time and attention.
features: Pomodoro timer with customizable intervals and breaks
Statistics and insights into focus and productivity
Customizable settings for notifications and alerts
target_audience: Students, professionals, and individuals who want to improve their productivity and reduce distractions
